content.en:
Even though the Golden Winged Realm Lord said that the success rate was very high, many extradimensional realms were still very afraid, because of such a big battle, the Six-Winged Family could not protect themselves, and the probability of falling was too high.

Even if they can destroy the Nine-Star Dark Serpent Clan at that time, they will definitely lose a lot of these extradimensional realms.

At this time, an extradimensional realm said, "Golden Winged Realm Lord, this operation is too dangerous, I want to give up. "

"I want to give up too!"

Every extradimensional realm wants to leave.

Seeing this, the Golden-Winged Realm Lord gritted his teeth and said, "Everyone, if you are willing to participate in the battle, every extradimensional realm can at least comprehend the three extradimensional epoch times of the mysterious fragments. Moreover, if you can kill the ten Nine-Star Dark Snakes of the First Realm, you can directly obtain a mysterious fragment. In addition, our Six-Winged Family is also willing to come up with the most suitable Super Dimensional Chiyuan Pill for the first realm of transcendent realm ascension. "

Super Dimensional Chiyuan Dan!

Many extradimensional realms were excited.

This is a super-dimensional elixir refined from many extra-dimensional resources, containing a terrifying 20 energy, which can quickly improve the cultivation of the first realm.

It is rumored that the second realm cannot refine the super-dimensional Chiyuan Pill, because this elixir needs to be refined with the extra-dimensional realm in the body.

In other words, the Six Thousand Territory could not refine this elixir at all, and it could only be purchased from the Five Thousand Territory, and there were too few forces that had the strength to leave the Six Thousand Territory and go to the Five Thousand Territory.

The Six-Winged Family has the strength to buy the Super Dimensional Chiyuan Pill, but the value of each Super Dimensional Chi Yuan Pill is incomparably precious.

It is said that a Super Dimensional Chiyuan Pill is worth 100 Super Dimensional Dao Coins, and Super Dimensional Dao Coins are higher value currencies than Super Dimensional Treasure Coins, and one Super Dimensional Dao Coin can be exchanged for 10 billion Super Dimensional Treasure Coins.

In other words, 100 Super Dimensional Dao Coins are worth 1 trillion Super Dimensional Treasure Coins.

The point is, even if there are 1 trillion or even more Super Dimensional Treasure Coins, you can't buy Super Dimensional Chiyuan Pill, because there is no way to buy it!

It is estimated that the Six-Winged Family does not have many extra-dimensional Chiyuan Pills, but they are willing to give them to these extra-dimensional realms, which shows how great the price needs to be paid for this mission.

Then, the plan of the Six-winged Family must be even greater.

At this time.

Many extra-dimensional realms have also thought of this, after all, when the benefits are disproportionate to the pay, there must be special circumstances.

But the extra-dimensional Chiyuan Pill, plus the mysterious fragments that can assist in comprehending the extradimensional rules, such a price is enough to attract many super-dimensional realm powerhouses in the first realm.

Of course, there will definitely be extradimensional realms leaving, but most of them will remain.

Really.

Originally, they also said that they were going to leave several extradimensional realms, but they all stayed, and in the end, only more than 20 extradimensional realms left, and these more than 20 extradimensional realms were all cultivated to reach the peak of the first realm, and they didn't need to be promoted by the superdimensional Chiyuan Dan, and they didn't feel that a piece of fragment could help them comprehend the superdimensional rules, and they were unwilling to take risks, so they would leave.

Ye Tian didn't leave, he wasn't afraid of danger, and this time the benefits given by the Six-Winged Family were too great, so he naturally wanted to get it.

For example, if he obtains one, there is a high probability that he will be able to raise his cultivation to the mid-stage realm of the first realm.

And that mysterious fragment may also help him comprehend some extradimensional rules.

So, he had to stay.

......

Seeing that so many extradimensional realms were left, the Golden Wing Realm Lord of the Six-Winged Family breathed a sigh of relief.

Immediately.

He began to arrange for many extra-dimensional realms, so that these extra-dimensional realms would stay in the Six-Winged Family first, and when everything was ready, he would attack the Nine-Star Dark Serpent Clan.

Ye Tian also honestly stayed in the Six-Winged Family to rest, and after a while, the Six-Winged Family was ready.

this day.

The Six-Winged Family, the Garan Chamber of Commerce, the Alchemy Treasure Building, and several other forces have all united, but they are dominated by the Six-Winged Family.

"Six second-realm extra-dimensional realms, more than five hundred first-realm extra-dimensional realms. "

Ye Tian was secretly surprised.

It stands to reason that such a scale is likely to wipe out the Nine-Star Pluto Snake Clan.

However, he always felt that things were not so simple.

After all, if it was so simple, the Six-Winged Family actually didn't need to invite Ye Tian and them to these extra-dimensional realms, just these forces could gather enough extra-dimensional realms.

If you are not willing to lose, the price you can pay is enough for the Six-Winged Family to bear. []

"Everyone, get on the treasure ship!"

The Six-Winged Family used the only Six-Winged Treasure Ship, which was a supreme treasure ship that was enough to defend against the powerhouses of the Second Realm, and it was also engraved with extradimensional rules.

Many extradimensional realms entered this treasure ship one after another, and then this treasure ship opened, instantly crossing the Death Void, tearing apart the boundary extradimensional barrier, and stepping into the territory of Six Thousand and Six.

At the same time, this treasure ship has also activated the stealth effect, even if it is the existence of the second realm, if you are not careful, it is not easy to spy on this six-winged treasure ship.

After a while, they approached the Nine-Star Hades Snake Clan.

"Everyone, follow the order, and when the six powerhouses of the second realm surround the three second realms of the nine-star pluto snake clan, you will work together to invade the nine-star pluto snake clan. "The Xuanyi Realm Lord of the Six-Winged Family arranged.

"Good!"

Many extradimensional realms respond.

Whoa!!!

The extra-dimensional realms of the second realm made a move, and in an instant, the 310 Nine-Star Dark Snake clan fought.

"Do it!"

Many extradimensional realms came out of the six-winged treasure ship and killed the nine-star dark snake clan.

Ye Tian also killed the Nine Star Dark Snake Clan, but secretly spied around.

But for now, everything seems to be normal, and there is no conspiracy.

However, Ye Tian discovered a strange thing, that is, the Six-Winged Family's extradimensional realm had a faint light curtain on their bodies, and this layer of light curtain strengthened their terrifying defenses, making it almost difficult for them to be injured.

On the contrary, other extradimensional realms have begun to be injured, and even at the moment of fighting, there are extradimensional realms that are about to fall.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian and the others found that the extradimensional realm of the Nine Star Dark Snake seemed to be more than recorded in the intelligence.

But by this time in the battle, it was impossible to get out.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian killed with a nine-star pluto snake whose strength was not very strong, and he did not reveal the secret of his comprehension of the extradimensional rules, otherwise he would be in big trouble.

As time passed, more and more extradimensional realms and the nine-star serpent fell and died.

Suddenly.

Those fallen extradimensional realms and the Nine-Star Snake seemed to have turned into blood light, which was absorbed by something deep in the Nine-Star Snake Clan.

At this moment, Ye Tian suddenly understood something.
